mano_cua.result_summary: 全部滑块测试通过。找到 Sliders 页面，测试了默认滑块、Value indicator（上/下）、Inset icon、Field elements、Custom slider 等变体。拖拽交互顺畅，值实时更新（33→51→70→100）。Value indicator tooltip 正常显示在 thumb 上方/下方。各尺寸（tiny/small/medium/large/extra）均正常渲染。无范围滑块可测试。键盘箭头键未响应但不在主要测试范围内。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All slider variants tested: default, value indicator (top/bottom), inset icon, field elements, custom. Drag interaction smooth, values update in real-time (33→70 confirmed). All size variants render correctly. No range sliders in demo. Keyboard arrow keys not responding but not primary test scope.
